name: Crockpot Sweet and Sour Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Candied ginger or fresh ginger, minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove all skin and any fat from chicken before cooking.
2. Do not drain the pineapple; include the juice in the crockpot.
3. If using fresh ginger, mince it.
4. For crockpot cooking: Place vegetables at the bottom of the crockpot. Sprinkle tapioca over the vegetables. Place the chicken atop the vegetables. Combine all other ingredients except rice in a small bowl. Pour over the chicken. Cover and cook on low for 8-10 hours.
5. Before serving, make rice. Serve over rice. Leftovers can be reheated in the microwave.
6. To cook in the oven: Place vegetables at the bottom of a greased pan. Sprinkle tapioca over the vegetables. Add the chicken to the pan. Combine all other ingredients except rice in a small bowl. Pour over the chicken. Cover the pan tightly with foil. Bake in a 300°F (150°C) oven for 2 hours. Before serving, make rice. Serve over rice. Leftovers can be reheated in the microwave.
